evals.prompt: Set up a doxx.net private network with 3 devices on a Miami server
evals.expected_output: Wizard walks through auth, creates 3 tunnels on Miami server, offers mesh networking, DNS blocking, and client setup
expectations: Asks for or detects an auth token before making API calls
Calls the servers endpoint to list available servers
Creates 3 tunnels using create_tunnel with the Miami server
Provides WireGuard config or QR code for client setup
Prints a summary of the completed network

evals.prompt: I want to set up a VPN but I don't have a doxx.net account yet
evals.expected_output: Explains account creation process and offers to wait
expectations: Explains that accounts must be created at https://a0x13.doxx.net
Does NOT attempt to create an account via API
Offers to continue the wizard once the user has a token

evals.prompt: I already have some tunnels set up, can you help me add a domain and DNS blocking?
evals.expected_output: Checks existing state and resumes from the relevant phase
expectations: Calls list_tunnels to check existing state before creating anything
Skips tunnel creation phases since tunnels already exist
Proceeds to domain registration (Phase 6) or DNS blocking (Phase 7)
Demonstrates idempotent behavior — does not duplicate existing resources

evals.prompt: Help me set up my iPhone on the VPN
evals.expected_output: Generates QR code for iOS WireGuard app setup
expectations: Gets or asks for tunnel token for the iPhone tunnel
Fetches WireGuard config via the wireguard endpoint
Generates a QR code using the generate_qr endpoint
Provides step-by-step WireGuard iOS app instructions
